scripts.prepare:assets: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const root=process.cwd(); const apiSrc=path.resolve(root,'..','api-server','dist'); const webSrc=path.resolve(root,'..','nibir-fashion','dist','public'); const sqliteSrc=path.resolve(root,'node_modules','better-sqlite3'); const bindingsSrc=path.resolve(root,'..','..','node_modules','.pnpm','bindings@1.5.0','node_modules','bindings'); const fileUriToPathSrc=path.resolve(root,'..','..','node_modules','.pnpm','file-uri-to-path@1.0.0','node_modules','file-uri-to-path'); const out=path.resolve(root,'packaged'); const copyOpts={recursive:true,dereference:true}; fs.mkdirSync(path.join(out,'api-server'),{recursive:true}); fs.mkdirSync(path.join(out,'nibir-fashion'),{recursive:true}); fs.mkdirSync(path.join(out,'api-server','node_modules'),{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync(apiSrc,path.join(out,'api-server'),copyOpts); fs.cpSync(webSrc,path.join(out,'nibir-fashion'),copyOpts); fs.cpSync(sqliteSrc,path.join(out,'api-server','node_modules','better-sqlite3'),copyOpts); fs.cpSync(bindingsSrc,path.join(out,'api-server','node_modules','bindings'),copyOpts); fs.cpSync(fileUriToPathSrc,path.join(out,'api-server','node_modules','file-uri-to-path'),copyOpts);"
scripts.build:web: cross-env PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=./ API_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:3001 pnpm --filter @workspace/nibir-fashion build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:web && pnpm run prepare:assets && pnpm run build:desktop
scripts.dist: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build && electron-builder
